{{Quote|Then you'll want to talk to Entha Kandela. She's one of the best scouts on Tatooine, and she's a real spitfire. I've never met anyone quite like her. Well, you'll see what I mean.|[[Mayor/Legends|Mayor]] [[Mikdanyell Guh'rantt]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ST">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=class|Scout|Scout Tasks|Tatooine}}</ref>}}
'''Entha Kandela''' was the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] who lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|The public health in Mos Eisley is in danger. If we don't get the vermin under control we will lose this city.|Entha Kandela, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ACO" />}}
Entha Kandela was a skilled scout<ref name="SWG:ST" /> who served as animal-control [[Officer/Legends|officer]] for the city of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], under the orders of [[Mayor/Legends|Mayor]] [[Mikdanyell Guh'rantt]]. She was severely underfunded by the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Because of this, the vermin outside the city walls became a major health hazard.<ref name="SWG:ACO" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> she hired an individual to deal with the problem. While affiliated with [[Jabba's criminal empire/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's criminal organization]], the spacer acted on behalf of the Mayor Mikdanyell Guh'rantt.<ref name="SWG:ACO" /> The spacer eliminated a number of [[Womp rat/Legends|womp rats]], [[kreetle]]s, [[Worrt/Legends|worrts]], [[Rill (species)|tempest rills]] and [[Rockmite/Legends|rockmites]] for 2,150 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], satisfying Kandela.<ref name="SWG:GmSS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Give me Some Skin|Tatooine}}</ref><ref name="SWG:BH">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Bug Hunt|Tatooine}}</ref><ref name="SWG:DB">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Dem Bones|Tatooine}}</ref><ref name="SWG:RT">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Rill Thing|Tatooine}}</ref><ref name="SWG:MM">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Mighty Mites|Tatooine}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Entha Kandela was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:ACO" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Entha Kandela was added to the game with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 17 Notes for 26 May 2005|Publish 17]]," on [[May 26]], [[2005]].<ref name="SWG:2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> She used to be a specialized trainer providing quests to the beginner players who had chosen a "[[W:c:swg:Scout|scout]]" career.<ref name="SWG:ST" /> The "scout" profession was later removed from the game upon the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]],<ref name="SWG:2005" /> and Entha Kandela's quests were widely revamped to be available for every new players.<ref name="SWG:ACO" />
